name: Blackrock Silver Corp.
description: Blackrock Silver Corp. is a junior precious metals exploration company focused on the discovery and development of high-grade silver and gold projects in Nevada, USA. The company's flagship asset is the Tonopah West project, located in the historic Tonopah silver district, which represents one of the most significant silver-gold discoveries in the region. Blackrock Silver is dedicated to expanding its resource base through systematic exploration and drilling programs.
